consit.about: An agrarian-heavy seat focused on the Kallazhagar Temple and granite industries. It serves as the gateway to Madurai from the northern and eastern districts.

problem.title: Summer Water Scarcity
problem.desc: Heavy reliance on seasonal tanks and Periyar-Vaigai water which often fails to reach the tail-end areas during crucial cultivation periods.

problem.title: Stalled Rail Connectivity
problem.desc: The long-pending Madurai-Melur-Karaikudi broad gauge rail project remains on paper, hindering industrial transport and pilgrim movement.

problem.title: Rural Road Neglect
problem.desc: While main highways are paved, interior village roads connecting agricultural hamlets are crumbling and narrow, preventing easy market access.

problem.title: Granite Industry Decline
problem.desc: The closure of many granite units has led to large-scale unemployment among local manual laborers who have no alternative skill sets.

problem.title: Paddy Procurement Delays
problem.desc: Lack of sufficient Direct Procurement Centers (DPCs) forces farmers to wait for weeks or sell to middlemen at lower rates.

consit.about: A mix of urban sprawl and rural pockets. It is currently witnessing rapid real-estate growth but lacks the infrastructure to match the population density.

problem.title: Sewage Overflow
problem.desc: Inadequate underground drainage (UGD) in newly annexed wards leads to frequent sewage stagnation in residential streets.

problem.title: NH-87 Congestion
problem.desc: Heavy traffic on the Paramakudi-Ramanathapuram section creates severe bottlenecks at junction points within the constituency.

problem.title: Drinking Water Gaps
problem.desc: Many household extensions still rely on private tankers as the piped water supply has not expanded at the rate of housing construction.

problem.title: Unplanned Real Estate
problem.desc: Rapid conversion of agricultural land into housing layouts without proper road width or storm-water drain planning.

problem.title: Public Health Center Shortage
problem.desc: The rapid population increase in eastern suburbs has not been met with a corresponding increase in primary health facilities.

consit.about: An SC-reserved constituency known as the 'rice bowl' of Madurai. Life here revolves around the Vaigai River and traditional agriculture.

problem.title: Peranai Regulator Siltation
problem.desc: Heavy silt accumulation in the regulator and canal systems reduces water flow efficiency to paddy fields during the monsoon.

problem.title: Lack of Cold Storage
problem.desc: Banana and coconut farmers face massive losses due to the absence of modern processing units and government-run cold storage facilities.

problem.title: Vaigai Encroachment
problem.desc: Illegal encroachments and waste dumping along the riverbanks have narrowed the river's path, increasing localized flood risks.

problem.title: Interior Connectivity
problem.desc: Narrow bridges over irrigation canals are in dilapidated condition, making it dangerous for heavy agricultural vehicles to cross.

problem.title: Dwindling Ground Water
problem.desc: Over-extraction for agriculture in non-canal areas has led to a dangerous drop in the water table, affecting drinking water wells.

consit.about: A vital urban segment housing major government offices and the Mattuthavani market hub. It is the face of 'Modern Madurai' but faces 'Old City' issues.

problem.title: Panthalkudi Canal Stagnation
problem.desc: The slow progress of canal works has turned this waterway into a breeding ground for mosquitoes and a source of foul smell.

problem.title: Market Chaos
problem.desc: The Mattuthavani vegetable market lacks proper waste management and organized parking, leading to daily traffic gridlock.

problem.title: Rainwater Inundation
problem.desc: Areas like Sellur and Bibikulam continue to face knee-deep waterlogging even after moderate rainfall due to clogged drains.

problem.title: Stalled Public Housing
problem.desc: Several slum clearance board projects are lagging, forcing low-income families to live in precarious conditions along canal banks.

problem.title: Encroached Main Roads
problem.desc: Major stretches like the 120-feet road are narrowed by illegal commercial parking and temporary sheds.

consit.about: The historical heart of the city with extremely high population density. It is dominated by small-scale industries, traders, and heritage sites.

problem.title: Obsolete UGD System
problem.desc: The drainage pipes in the historic core are nearly a century old and cannot handle the current load, leading to constant leaks.

problem.title: Encroached Footpaths
problem.desc: Commercial activity has swallowed pedestrian spaces, forcing people to walk on roads and worsening traffic snarls.

problem.title: Slum Housing Quality
problem.desc: Urban poor in wards like 39 and 43 live in dilapidated conditions with limited access to private sanitation.

problem.title: Air Pollution
problem.desc: High density of old commercial vehicles and narrow lanes create pockets of severe air pollution that affect the elderly and children.

problem.title: Fire Safety Risk
problem.desc: Many wholesale godowns operate in narrow lanes where a fire engine cannot enter, creating a ticking time bomb for the neighborhood.

consit.about: The political and religious center (Meenakshi Temple). High-profile seat currently navigating major infra overhaul like Goripalayam Flyover.

problem.title: Gridlock Traffic
problem.desc: The narrow streets surrounding the temple are permanently choked, exacerbated by ongoing construction projects.

problem.title: Vaigai Pollution
problem.desc: Direct discharge of untreated sewage and meat waste from Nelpettai into the river remains an unsolved environmental disaster.

problem.title: Unreliable Metro Progress
problem.desc: Project delays due to feasibility disputes between Center and State have left residents without a mass transit solution.

problem.title: Parking Scarcity
problem.desc: Lack of designated multi-level parking forces tourists and locals to park on-street, narrowing already tight lanes.

problem.title: Heritage Decay
problem.desc: Beyond the main temple, several historic buildings and 'Mantapams' are suffering from neglect and illegal occupation.

consit.about: A highly urbanized voter base. It is the residential hub for the city's middle class but struggles with 'extension area' neglect.

problem.title: Extension Area UGD
problem.desc: Newly developed layouts in the western periphery are still waiting for integrated underground drainage lines.

problem.title: Public Space Shortage
problem.desc: Despite high tax collection, residents lack sufficient public parks and recreational centers for the dense population.

problem.title: Primary Healthcare Strain
problem.desc: Urban Primary Health Centers (UPHCs) are understaffed, forcing residents to travel to the distant Government Rajaji Hospital.

problem.title: Garbage Collection Gaps
problem.desc: Outer wards report erratic door-to-door waste collection, leading to garbage being dumped in open vacant plots.

problem.title: Drinking Water Pressure
problem.desc: High-altitude areas in the west suffer from very low pressure in the municipal water lines during summer months.

consit.about: A suburban hub centered on the Murugan hill shrine. It is rapidly transitioning from a pilgrim town to a major residential suburb.

problem.title: Deepathoon Dispute
problem.desc: Ongoing legal and social tension regarding religious rights on the hill shrine continues to affect local communal harmony.

problem.title: Garbage Mismanagement
problem.desc: Municipal waste collection has failed to reach the outer boundaries, leading to illegal burning of trash.

problem.title: Unplanned Urbanization
problem.desc: Rapid construction of high-rises without widening existing narrow approach roads has made fire safety a nightmare.

problem.title: Railway Gate Delays
problem.desc: Frequent closure of railway gates at key junctions cuts off entire neighborhoods for hours daily.

problem.title: Temple Tourism Infrastructure
problem.desc: Lack of adequate public toilets and cloakrooms for the thousands of daily pilgrims visiting the Murugan temple.

consit.about: A strategic administrative center and agricultural belt. It is a major transit point for all vehicles moving further south.

problem.title: Youth Unemployment
problem.desc: Lack of major industrial estates or IT parks forces local graduates to migrate to larger cities for survival.

problem.title: Inadequate Bus Terminus
problem.desc: The existing town bus stand is too small, leading to dangerous boarding conditions on the main highway.

problem.title: Paddy Procurement Corruption
problem.desc: Farmers frequently report 'commission' demands and unfair trade practices at the Direct Procurement Centres (DPCs).

problem.title: Highway Safety
problem.desc: The intersection of the town road and the four-way highway is an accident blackspot lacking proper lighting and signals.

problem.title: Irrigation Canal Clogging
problem.desc: Tail-end areas of the 58-canal project often receive no water due to illegal tapping and siltation upstream.

consit.about: Located between Madurai and Theni, it is a politically sensitive region with a deep socio-cultural history and agrarian roots.

problem.title: Healthcare Infrastructure
problem.desc: The Government Headquarters Hospital lacks an adequate mortuary and specialized wards, forcing referrals to Madurai city.

problem.title: Drinking Water Scarcity
problem.desc: The 58-canal project and local water schemes are insufficient to meet the needs of tail-end villages.

problem.title: Industrial Stagnation
problem.desc: Zero major investments in the last decade have left the local economy entirely dependent on volatile agricultural returns.

problem.title: Educational Access
problem.desc: Students from rural hamlets face poor public transport connectivity to reach colleges in Madurai or the local town.

problem.title: Livestock Support
problem.desc: As a major cattle-rearing area, the lack of modern veterinary hospitals and fodder subsidies is hurting local livelihoods.
